main: Hi, I’m ${name}, Senior Engineering Manager and Platform Architect based in Munich.
main.tagline: Leading Teams. Modernizing Platforms. Enabling Engineering Excellence.
about.title: About me
about.paragraph1: I’m Flavius Cojocariu, a Senior Engineering Manager based in Munich, Germany. I lead two platform teams at IU Group — Germany’s largest university — owning the technical direction for student-facing platforms serving over 100,000 users. My work spans platform architecture, team building, and engineering strategy.
about.paragraph2: With 13+ years in software engineering and 5+ years in engineering leadership, I’ve built teams from scratch, driven monolith-to-microservices migrations, introduced observability and DORA-aligned practices, and designed data architectures across organizational boundaries. I operate at the intersection of hands-on technical depth and organizational leadership.
about.paragraph3: I work alongside Heads of Engineering and Directors on cross-company data strategy, and I’ve been selected for task forces that shape how data flows across pre-sales, sales, and post-sales. My peer group is HoEs and Directors — I contribute to quarterly alignment on cross-platform strategy, team structure, and organizational planning.
about.paragraph4: Beyond my full-time role, I help growing tech companies modernize their platform architecture and scale their engineering teams. If you’re a Mittelstand company or scale-up navigating a platform transition, a team scaling challenge, or an architecture decision — I can help.
about.paragraph5: I’m always open to conversations about engineering leadership, platform architecture, or potential collaborations.
services.title: Services
services.frontend.title: Frontend Development
services.frontend.description: Creating scalable, responsive, and user-centered interfaces for web applications
services.frontend.content: UI/UX Implementation: Engaging and functional user interfaces.
Architecture Definition: Structuring for scalability and maintainability.
Component-Based Development: Reusable components and microfrontends.
Core Technology: TypeScript for clean, efficient code.
services.backend.title: Backend development
service.backend.description: Building robust, scalable backend architectures tailored for business growth.
services.backend.content: API Design & Implementation: Crafting RESTful APIs for seamless communication.
Microservices Architecture: Modular systems that scale easily.
Event-Driven Systems: Real-time data processing for responsive applications.
Data Management: SQL/NoSQL for secure, efficient data handling.
CI/CD & System Design: Streamlining deployments and ensuring fast, reliable releases.
services.consultancy.title: Consulting
services.consultancy.description: Expert guidance on digital transformation, team growth, and product strategies.
services.consultancy.content: Digital Transformation: Helping companies adopt digital solutions effectively.
Team Leadership & Development: Leveraging experience in building high-performing teams.
Product Strategy & Growth: Aligning technical direction with business objectives.
Industry Insight: Specialized knowledge across SaaS, e-commerce, edtech, IoT, and fintech.
projects.title: Portfolio Highlights
projects.description: In my portfolio highlights, you’ll find a curated selection of key projects that showcase my ability to develop dynamic, user-centered web applications. Each project demonstrates my commitment to excellence, combining creativity with advanced technologies. For an in-depth look at my work and experience, explore the full details on my resume.

projects.list.title: Engineering Manager | IU Group, Munich, Germany (Jan 2024 - Present)
projects.list.body: Lead a team of 6 engineers with a focus on code reviews, small development tasks, and pair programming for configuration support. Oversee collaboration across clusters and engage in strategic planning with the Product Owner team, implementing OKR-driven processes. Restructure team workflows by introducing a sprint process combining XP and Scrum. Conduct 1-on-1 meetings for team development, handle hiring and onboarding, and monitor DORA metrics to enhance performance. Work closely with the Head of Engineering on strategic and technical projects.

projects.list.title: Senior Software Engineer | remberg GmbH, Munich, Germany (Jan 2022 - Dec 2023)
projects.list.body: Played a key role in architectural decision-making and led code refactoring efforts, transitioning backend features to NestJS for improved code quality. Served as lead developer on two major projects, including migrating email functionality from Mailgun to AWS SES and enhancing file management with a new folder structure. Actively participated in hiring and onboarding, conducting technical interviews and guiding new team members in software architecture.

projects.list.title: Software Engineer - Lead Backend Engineer | ThinxNet GmbH, Munich, Germany (June 2019 - Dec 2021)
projects.list.body: Led backend development, advancing the API-Gateway and transitioning monolithic features to microservices. Built and managed a backend team of 5, actively hiring, onboarding, and mentoring team members. Collaborated with Product Owners and the Head of Software to meet sprint goals, implemented MVPs, and guided the team through technical challenges.

projects.list.title: Fullstack Web Developer | Travador GmbH, Munich, Germany (Nov 2016 - May 2019)
projects.list.body: Collaborated with design teams to develop new features and UI components, performed daily maintenance and refactoring, and led the planning of enhancements for the booking platform and website. Contributed to full-stack microservices development.

projects.list.title: Web Developer | SMAL GmbH (formerly Ziba Design), Munich, Germany (Feb 2015 - Oct 2016)
projects.list.body: Developed responsive prototypes and web applications, contributing to both client planning sessions and technical discussions to ensure alignment with project goals. Maintained high code quality through thorough code reviews.

projects.list.title: Web Developer | Multiple Employers, Germany & Romania (April 2012 - February 2015)
projects.list.body: Contributed to diverse projects across various industries, focusing on white-label product implementations, responsive web design, and hybrid mobile applications. Highlights include creating a knowledge base for code snippets, modernizing online questionnaires, and teaching HTML/CSS basics to team members.
